title: Phodd Communications
content: Second only to the East Rim Company in the field of mass media broadcasting, Phodd Communications is remarkable for the fact that it's one of the few real competitors to the corporate hegemony of the ERC. Phodd owns most of the most popular brands within Hydian, Domedeus, and Pavraeu sectors, including the largest sector news companies for each of them. The operations of PhoddCom is centered around the planet Cadrin, essentially a planetwide corporate park that hosts everything the company could ever need. Cadrin is legally owned by Phodd Communications, and as such, has been granted special observer status within the Galactic Senate.
